message:
test(conformance): differential harness for fcntl.h vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc fcntl.h diff matrix.

5 functions, 8 tests, per-test tempdir isolation:
- open_existing_file: 4 flag combos (RDONLY/RDWR/CLOEXEC/NOFOLLOW)
- open_missing_file: rc + errno match (ENOENT)
- open_create_with_mode: O_CREAT|O_EXCL with 0o644; re-open with
  O_EXCL must EEXIST on both
- openat_at_fdcwd: rc match for AT_FDCWD-relative open
- creat: rc + post-call st_mode bits via libc::stat
- fcntl_dupfd_and_getfd: F_DUPFD(min=100) + F_GETFD + F_SETFD
  (FD_CLOEXEC) round-trip + F_GETFL
- posix_fadvise: 6 advice values (NORMAL/SEQUENTIAL/RANDOM/WILLNEED/
  DONTNEED/NOREUSE) on a 4096-byte file

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
